name_cn:
ALMA BB Handbag #️⃣M82717
Exclusive global launch! This style is custom-made according to Chanel boutique specifications, with dynamic chip serial numbers. Original factory materials, original factory light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic). Please compare with the authentic French version. We ensure 100% authenticity! Original factory materials, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship + official website latest gift box!
